text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I became Sasami<n>Anshinzawa's
acupuncture test<n>dummy, I've grown
accustomed to<n>playing along with her whims. On
one<n>such day...
Come... Come hither...
choice_data_list: ...Am I being called by the Three Goddesses?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt! Wrong deity! This isSasami Anshinzawa, divineacupuncturist, at your service! ☆
choice_data_list: Um... So what'd you call me here for?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, you've been in a slump and<n>haven't made
much progress lately,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
So I thought I'd give you a nice little<n>poke using
some extra extraordinary<n>needles! ♪
choice_data_list:
What do you mean, "extra" extraordinary?! I
think I'll pass!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: C'mon, <username>! Don't be a<n>spoilsport! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll open up a world of new<n>possibilities, just for
you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Annnd POKE! (Poke... poke... poke...)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The moment the needle pricks me, a<n>flood of
unfamiliar faces and voices<n>infiltrates my mind!

text_block_list.name: Founder of Acupuncture
text_block_list.text:
Behold, acupuncture! The power that<n>will save all
of Umamusume-kind!

text_block_list.name: Unnamed Acupuncturist A
text_block_list.text:
One day, I hope to give all<n>Umamusume a life free
from worries!

text_block_list.name: Unnamed Acupuncturist B
text_block_list.text:
What incredible running! I wish to give<n>them the
poke they need to achieve<n>their dreams!

text_block_list.name: Unnamed Acupuncturist C
text_block_list.text:
To pave the way for their futures with<n>
acupuncture... That is our one and<n>only wish...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I feel the weight of many wishes and<n>desires
being entrusted to me.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A fire burns within my chest... and an<n>
uncontainable power bursts from me!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: What the?! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Partner Running Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Is that <chrname>'s trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Partner Running Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Holy smokes, what insane speed! I<n>can't keep
up!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Fascinating! To think he can match<n>Umamusume
in speed! This is beyond<n>my wildest dreams!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Fascinating! To think she can match<n>
Umamusume in speed! This is beyond<n>my
wildest dreams!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Could Trainer also secretly be an<n>Umamusu—no,
surely not...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hooray! ♪ Did all of you see the<n>results of my
acupuncture skills?!<n>Wow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, I go partner running with<n><chrname>
to my heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems Sasami Anshinzawa was<n>true to her
word and really did open up<n>a world of new
possibilities for me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The day following that wondrous,<n>one-off
moment...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That poke really did the trick, didn't<n>it? I could
barely tell you apart from an<n>actual Umamusume
from the way you<n>ran!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what's wrong? You look like<n>you've
seen much better days.
choice_data_list: M-my whole body... is so sore...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear! I guess the greater the<n>results, the
greater the side effects...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But don't you worry! As long as you<n>keep up
your training, I'm sure you'll<n>eventually be able
to handle the speed<n>boost without repercussions!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Although her words raise alarm bells<n>in every
fiber of my being...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the event that we really do achieve<n>that
possibility someday, I would love<n>to run
alongside <chrname> once more.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the event that we really do achieve<n>that
possibility someday, I would love<n>to run
alongside <chrname> once more.
